chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-871 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.3675/2023 3. For hearing of main case 17-10-2023 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Jarrab Siyal, Advocate for Complainant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
